summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PMS Core Hardening - all 8 hardening areas verified: Reservation State Machine, Front Desk Workflow, Folio/Billing, Housekeeping State, Night Audit Engine, Role/Permission RBAC, PMS Operational Dashboard, and comprehensive tests. 53 unit tests pass, 25 API tests pass, frontend dashboard fully functional with all 3 tabs working.
critical_code_review_comments: All 8 PMS hardening modules implemented correctly with proper business rules
Reservation state machine enforces valid transitions: pending→confirmed→checked_in→checked_out
Terminal states (cancelled, no_show, checked_out) properly reject further transitions
Front desk workflows validate room readiness before check-in (available/inspected status required)
Folio operations require open folio status, void operations require reason
Housekeeping state machine enforces valid room status transitions
Night audit engine handles business date roll, room charge posting, no-show processing
RBAC properly enforces permissions per role (admin has all, front_desk has check-in/checkout, etc.)
Dashboard aggregates real-time operational data: arrivals, departures, room status, exceptions
All endpoints properly authenticated and return correct HTTP status codes

success_rate.frontend: 100% (PMS Operations page with all 3 tabs working)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing hotel demo data (30 rooms: 17 available, 9 occupied, 1 dirty, 3 cleaning; 10 in-house guests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PMS Core Hardening fully tested and working. All APIs at /api/pms-core/* prefix confirmed functional. Unit tests in test_pms_hardening.py use mocking for database operations. API tests in test_pms_hardening_api.py test against live endpoints. Frontend PMS Operations page at /pms-operations shows KPI cards, room status bar, and 3 tabs (Overview, Night Audit, Audit Trail). 19 pending_departure exceptions exist from night audit runs - these are expected test artifacts.
passed_tests: 53 unit tests in test_pms_hardening.py: state machine, front desk, folio, housekeeping, night audit, RBAC, tax rounding, availability checks
GET /api/pms-core/dashboard/operational returns arrivals, departures, in_house, room_status, folio_issues, exceptions, blocked_checkins
GET /api/pms-core/permissions/me returns user role and permissions list
GET /api/pms-core/checkout-preview/{booking_id} returns folio summary and blockers
GET /api/pms-core/folio/tax-breakdown/{folio_id} returns tax breakdown by category
POST /api/pms-core/walk-in rejects occupied room, accepts available room
UI: PMS Operations page loads with all 7 KPI cards
UI: Room Status Bar shows color-coded segments with legend
UI: Overview tab shows arrivals, departures, exceptions, blocked check-ins
UI: Night Audit tab shows business date and Run Night Audit button
UI: Audit Trail tab shows recent audit entries with timestamps
